Variables.Name: EditorStartupMap
Variables.Description: If set, this map will be loaded when the Editor starts up.

Variables.Name: LocalMapOptions
Variables.Description: The default options that will be appended to a map being loaded.

Variables.Name: TransitionMap
Variables.Description: The map loaded when transition from one map to another.

Variables.Name: bUseSplitscreen
Variables.Description: Whether the screen should be split or not when multiple local players are present

Variables.Name: TwoPlayerSplitscreenLayout
Variables.Description: The viewport layout to use if the screen should be split and there are two local players

Variables.Name: ThreePlayerSplitscreenLayout
Variables.Description: The viewport layout to use if the screen should be split and there are three local players

Variables.Name: bOffsetPlayerGamepadIds
Variables.Description:
If enabled, this will make so that gamepads start being assigned to the second controller ID in local multiplayer games.
	 In PIE sessions with multiple windows, this has the same effect as enabling "Route 1st Gamepad to 2nd Client"

Variables.Name: GameInstanceClass
Variables.Description: The class to use when instantiating the transient GameInstance class

Variables.Name: GameDefaultMap
Variables.Description: The map that will be loaded by default when no other map is loaded.

Variables.Name: ServerDefaultMap
Variables.Description: The map that will be loaded by default when no other map is loaded (DEDICATED SERVER).

Variables.Name: GlobalDefaultGameMode
Variables.Description: GameMode to use if not specified in any other way. (e.g. per-map DefaultGameMode or on the URL).

Variables.Name: GlobalDefaultServerGameMode
Variables.Description:
GameMode to use if not specified in any other way. (e.g. per-map DefaultGameMode or on the URL) (DEDICATED SERVERS)
	  If not set, the GlobalDefaultGameMode value will be used.

Variables.Name: GameModeMapPrefixes
Variables.Description: Overrides the GameMode to use when loading a map that starts with a specific prefix

Variables.Name: GameModeClassAliases
Variables.Description: List of GameModes to load when game= is specified in the URL (e.g. "DM" could be an alias for "MyProject.MyGameModeMP_DM")
